# SnoNotFoundException constructor

A specific SNO (by group/id and folder) could not be resolved. Distinct from [`CascContentNotFoundException`](../CascContentNotFoundException.md) so callers can cleanly tell "this SNO legitimately has no such content — skip it" from a real transport failure.

public SnoNotFoundException(string message)
